channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: House Committee Holds Hearing in VP Sara Duterte Impeachment Case
item.description: The House of Representatives convened on Tuesday, April 14th, to resume impeachment proceedings against Vice President Sara Duterte. The hearing included testimony from key figures, notably Ramil Madr...

item.title: Inquiry Blames Southport Killer's Parents, Cites Systemic Failures
item.description: A damning inquiry has revealed that the fatal knife attack at a Taylor Swift-themed dance class in Southport, England in 2024 could have been avoided if the killer's parents had reported his concernin...

item.title: UN special rapporteur Francesca Albanese describes threats and sanctions following Gaza genocide allegations
item.description: Francesca Albanese, the UN special rapporteur on the situation of human rights in the Palestinian territories occupied since 1967, has spoken about the intense personal and professional consequences s...

item.title: Inquiry Finds Systemic Failures and Parental Negligence Enabled Southport Attack
item.description: The inquiry into the Southport attack has concluded that the tragedy could have been prevented if proper actions had been taken by both state agencies and the offender’s parents. Axel Rudakubana, who ...

item.title: Suspect charged after arson attack involving Molotov cocktail at residence of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman
item.description: The referenced news article could not be accessed due to a server permission restriction, and therefore its full content was not retrievable. However, based on the URL and available headline informati...

item.title: IMD forecasts below-normal southwest monsoon rainfall in India for 2026 season
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has forecast that India is likely to receive below-normal rainfall during the southwest monsoon season, which runs from June to September. According to the ea...

item.title: Higher fuel and fertiliser costs put pressure on South Africa’s food prices
item.description: Rising diesel and fertiliser costs are placing significant pressure on South Africa’s agricultural sector, with farming groups warning that this will likely filter through to higher food prices for co...

item.title: Ombudsman launches fact-finding review on Trillanes’ corruption complaints against VP Sara Duterte
item.description: The Office of the Ombudsman has confirmed that it is currently conducting a fact-finding investigation into multiple criminal complaints filed by former Senator Antonio Trillanes IV against Vice Presi...

item.title: Pope Leo says him role na to promote peace, no to dey engage Trump politically
item.description: Pope Leo XIV don yan say e no dey fear Donald Trump or him administration, and e no go engage for political fight. The Pope talk say him job na to preach the Gospel and dey promote peace, not to dey i...

item.title: David Landsman arrested in Georgia over alleged assault and strangulation incident
item.description: David Landsman, identified as the boyfriend of podcast host and former reality TV personality Lindsie Chrisley, was arrested in Cherokee County, Georgia, following an alleged violent incident. Authori...

item.title: Carney Secures Liberal Majority in Parliament Amidst Unique Circumstances
item.description: Canada's political landscape has shifted significantly, as Mark Carney, a former central bank governor, has unexpectedly secured a majority government for the Liberal party. This remarkable achievemen...

item.title: PTI Expresses Concerns Over Deteriorating Health of Jailed Leaders
item.description: The Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) has raised serious concerns regarding the health of its incarcerated leaders, most notably former Prime Minister Imran Khan and Senator Ejaz Chaudhry. The party alle...

item.title: CBSE to Announce Class 10 Results 2026 Soon, Details on How and Where to Check
item.description: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) is likely to announce the Class 10 board examination results for 2026 soon. Students across India and abroad can access their results through the offici...

item.title: Sudhir Dhawale and the Role of Maharashtra’s Folk Arts in Dalit Cultural Resistance
item.description: The article explores how Marathi poet, activist and co-founder of the Republican Panthers, Sudhir Dhawale, has used Maharashtra’s rich folk traditions as a tool of cultural and political resistance ag...

item.title: Opinion column highlights concerns over attack on Senator Osotsi and broader national issues
item.description: This opinion column brings together several public views on current national issues in Kenya, with the most prominent being the condemnation of the brutal attack on Vihiga Senator Godfrey Osotsi in Ki...

item.title: Islamabad private schools accused of failing to implement 10% scholarship quota, causing Rs5–6 billion annual loss
item.description: A report presented before the Islamabad High Court (IHC) has revealed serious non-compliance by private educational institutions (PEIs) in the federal capital regarding the mandatory 10% scholarship q...

item.title: Free Transport in Victoria Shows Limited Impact Compared to NSW During Fuel Price Spike
item.description: Following a sharp rise in fuel prices due to conflict in the Middle East, Victoria and Tasmania introduced free public transport to ease travel costs, while Queensland maintained its 50‑cent flat fare...

item.title: ED Takes I-PAC Director Vinesh Chandel into 10-Day Custody over Money Laundering Allegations
item.description: On Monday, Vinesh Chandel, director at Indian political consultancy I-PAC, was arrested in Delhi by the Enforcement Directorate (ED) in connection with a money laundering case linked to alleged illega...

item.title: Global oil prices rebound above $100 per barrel within four days
item.description: Oil prices have surged back above $100 per barrel just four days after dropping below this threshold. This rapid rebound highlights ongoing volatility in the global energy market, influenced by a comb...

item.title: Karachi faces severe disruption due to unannounced gas supply cuts
item.description: Karachi is currently facing severe inconvenience due to unannounced gas load-shedding, which has disrupted daily life across multiple residential areas. According to reports, the Sui Southern Gas Comp...
